title: Transaction Auto Commit
text: Transaction Auto Commit Determines whether transactions are committed if the component instance that started the transaction is deleted. Valid values are True or False (default). By default, transactions are rolled back if the component instance is deleted. When set in Global Updates, specify the transaction type property as part of an associated list with the Type property: TYPE= TypeNumber ; COMMIT=T | F Value Description True If the component instance that started the transaction is deleted, the transaction is committed. False (default) If the component instance that started the transaction is deleted, the transaction is rolled back. Applies To Signature Related Links Transaction Type Transaction mode for all operations in the component when run in a distributed transaction processing environment. Was this topic helpful?
